# Gestion Velora

> Property management in Montreal: condo board management, long-term rental, and short-term rental operations.

Homepage: [https://www.gestionvelora.com/](https://www.gestionvelora.com/)
Last updated: 2026-04-22
Languages: fr-CA, en-CA
